source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements and publicly cited programmes. industry_sources cite real published works.

levers.description: Expand tower sharing (passive) and radio access network sharing (active) with other operators to reduce site O&M, power, and spectrum costs per subscriber.
industry_sources: DoT National Telecom Policy 2012 / 2023 update — network sharing guidelines for active and passive sharing in India
Indus Towers FY25 Annual Report (BSE 534816) — tower sharing economics: >3 tenancies per tower reduces per-operator cost by 40-60%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — network sharing savings calibrated from 2 India telecom network strategy mandates

levers.lever_name: Tower Energy Optimisation (Solar, Li-ion, Free Cooling)
levers.description: Deploy rooftop solar + Li-ion batteries at towers to reduce diesel generator use. Implement free-air cooling for equipment rooms. Renegotiate grid power tariffs.
industry_sources: Indus Towers FY25 Annual Report — energy cost 35.7% of tower revenue; solar deployment reducing diesel dependency
TRAI Annual Report 2023-24 — energy is single largest cost for tower companies; DoT mandate for 50% green energy for towers by 2025
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — tower energy savings from 3 India telecom infrastructure energy mandates

levers.description: Replace ageing 2G/3G network elements with single RAN (vRAN/Open RAN) that serves 4G/5G on same hardware. Reduce network element footprint via consolidation.
industry_sources: GSMA Mobile Economy India 2024 (gsma.com) — 5G Open RAN reduces per-site network opex 20-30% vs. traditional RAN
Airtel FY25 Annual Report — 5G rollout on existing 4G spectrum; network efficiency investment cited
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — network modernisation savings from 2 India telecom network transformation mandates

levers.description: AI-driven churn prediction; personalised retention offers; postpaid migration of high-value prepaid customers; value-added services bundling to increase ARPU.
industry_sources: TRAI Annual Report 2023-24 — subscriber churn dynamics; customer acquisition cost ₹200-500; retention 60-80% cheaper
Airtel FY25 Annual Report — ARPU improvement strategy: prepaid to postpaid migration, home broadband bundling
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — churn reduction and ARPU uplift savings from 3 India telecom commercial excellence mandates

levers.description: Replace siloed legacy OSS/BSS with cloud-native unified platforms. Automate fault management, service provisioning, and revenue assurance.
industry_sources: GSMA India 2024 — OSS/BSS modernisation: 15-25% reduction in IT maintenance + 30% faster service launch
Gartner Telecom IT 2024 — cloud-native BSS reduces IT opex 20-30% vs. legacy on-premise systems
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — OSS/BSS modernisation savings from 1 India telecom IT transformation mandate

levers.description: Predictive field workforce dispatch (AI-scheduled maintenance vs. reactive); consolidated NOC; reduce mean time to repair (MTTR) via remote diagnostics before truck rolls.
industry_sources: Gartner Telecom Operations 2024 — AI-driven field service management reduces truck rolls 20-30% and MTTR 15-25%
Indus Towers FY25 Annual Report — field force optimisation as operational efficiency lever for tower operations
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — field operations savings from 2 India telecom network operations mandates
